title: Simple Armour Hud
body:
# Armour HUD

> **See your armour durability at a glance — always.**

Armour HUD adds a clean, lightweight armour display that sits next to your hotbar so you never get caught off guard by a piece of armour about to break mid-combat.

---

## ✨ Features

- **Always visible** — stays on screen even when your inventory, chests, or other menus are open
- **Landscape or portrait** — switch between a horizontal row (matching your hotbar) or a vertical stack
- **Durability percentage** — optionally show a colour-coded percentage next to each piece
- **Fully customisable position** — drag the HUD anywhere using the X/Y sliders in settings
- **Toggle individual slots** — hide helmet, chestplate, leggings or boots independently
- **Colour coded** — green when healthy, yellow when worn, red when nearly broken
- **Mod Menu support** — all settings accessible directly from the Mod Menu config button, no config file editing needed

---

## 🎨 Colour coding

| Colour | Meaning |
|--------|---------|
| 🟢 Green | Above 60% durability |
| 🟡 Yellow | Between 25–60% durability |
| 🔴 Red | Below 25% durability |

---
Notice: This mod can and WILL NOT be shared without consent from me, credit would be nice.
